g.text: M2: Distance Engine - Metric Trait Hierarchy

ol.li: Zero-Cost Abstraction: All Metric types are ZSTs. No heap allocation on init.
SIMD Alignment: All input slices &[f32] MUST be 32-byte aligned for AVX-512 optimization paths.
Polarity: is_similarity() return value determines TopKSelector priority (Max-Heap for similarity, Min-Heap for distance).
Cache Usage: batch_distance utilizes prefetching for the query vector to keep it in L1 cache during iteration.

g.title: Core interface for all distance and similarity computations.
